knownLimitations: Offline motion candidate only; no runtime load, state registration, marker execution, or Combat behavior was tested.
Current src/game.js attack-rate records differ from data/design/hero-balance-v1.json; both are preserved in sidecars and no balance value was changed.
Board-scale artifact is a neutral motion-readability proxy, not a replacement for the deferred 8x8 isometric Board Preview.
Future buffed attack-speed overlap and runtime acknowledgment policy remain integration-time validation items.
